title: Today's Markets Brief: Momentum Stocks on the Rise
summary: A quick look at today's market movers, with a focus on momentum stocks and AI.

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to today's markets brief. I'm looking at some interesting movers in the market, and I want to walk you through a couple of them. First up, Wolfe Research is saying that momentum stocks may extend their gains on the AI theme. This is getting a lot of attention, and for good reason - AI is still a hot topic in tech. It's been a while since we've seen such excitement around a particular technology, and it's not hard to see why investors are eager to get in on the action.

According to Wolfe Research, momentum stocks - those that are already showing strong growth - might just keep on growing as investors bet on AI. It's a bit of a self-reinforcing cycle: investors see these stocks doing well, and they want in on the action. I'm not sure if it's a virtuous cycle or a bit of a bubble, but it's definitely something to keep an eye on. And it's not just AI - RTX stock is also making waves today, climbing on some positive news that's got investors feeling more confident.

Another stock that's been on my radar is RTX. The question on everyone's mind is: why is it climbing? It seems that there's some positive news out there that's got investors feeling more optimistic. Without getting into specifics, it's clear that RTX is on the move, and that's worth keeping an eye on. What's interesting to me is how these stocks can move quickly, and it's a good reminder to stay on top of market news.

My quick read: today's market story has that familiar split-screen feeling. There is real excitement around artificial intelligence and chips, but the room still keeps one eye on risk, because markets enjoy a celebration more when they know where the exits are.
